mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE nickname = #{nickname}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, nickname, allergies, marketing_agree, is_active) VALUES (#{cmd.email}, #{cmd.password}, #{cmd.nickname}, #{cmd.allergies}, #{cmd.marketingAgree}, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT member_id AS memberId, email AS email, password AS password, nickname AS nickname, is_active AS isActive, role AS role FROM member WHERE email = #{email} LIMIT 1

SELECT member_id AS memberId, email AS email, password AS password, nickname AS nickname, is_active AS isActive, role AS role FROM member WHERE social_provider = #{provider} AND social_id = #{socialId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (email, password, nickname, social_provider, social_id, role, is_active) VALUES (#{cmd.email}, NULL, #{cmd.nickname}, #{cmd.provider}, #{cmd.socialId}, 'USER', 1)
mapper.select: SELECT member_id AS memberId, email, password, nickname, profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, allergies, is_active AS isActive FROM member WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE member SET password = #{password} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE member SET allergies = #{allergies} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE member SET profile_image_url = #{imageUrl} WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = 1
UPDATE member SET is_active = 0 WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND is_active = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fridge_item WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE followee_id = #{memberId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{memberId}

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fridge_item WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS fridgeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wishlist WHERE member_id = #{memberId}) AS wishlistCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE followee_id = #{memberId}) AS followerCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE follower_id = #{memberId}) AS followingCount

SELECT r.review_id AS reviewId, r.recipe_id AS recipeId, rc.title AS recipeTitle, rc.image_url AS recipeThumbnailUrl, r.rating, r.content, r.created_at AS createdAt FROM review r JOIN recipe rc ON rc.recipe_id = r.recipe_id WHERE r.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT m.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE member_id = m.member_id) AS reviewCount, 1 AS isFollowing FROM follow f JOIN member m ON m.member_id = f.followee_id WHERE f.follower_id = #{memberId} AND m.is_active = 1 ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT m.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickname, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE member_id = m.member_id) AS reviewCount, EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow f2 WHERE f2.follower_id = #{memberId} AND f2.followee_id = m.member_id ) AS isFollowing FROM follow f JOIN member m ON m.member_id = f.follower_id WHERE f.followee_id = #{memberId} AND m.is_active = 1 ORDER BY f.created_at DESC

SELECT b.badge_id AS badgeId, b.name, b.icon_url AS iconUrl, mb.earned_at AS earnedAt FROM member_badge mb JOIN badge b ON b.badge_id = mb.badge_id WHERE mb.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mb.earned_at DESC

SELECT m.member_id AS memberId, m.nickname AS nickname, m.profile_image_url AS profileImageUrl, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review WHERE member_id = m.member_id) AS reviewCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM recipe WHERE author_id = m.member_id AND is_public = TRUE) AS recipeCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM follow WHERE followee_id = m.member_id) AS followerCount,
EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow f WHERE f.follower_id = #{viewerId} AND f.followee_id = m.member_id )
0
AS isFollowing FROM member m WHERE m.member_id = #{memberId} AND m.is_active = 1 LIMIT 1
